topic: Managing 40 client work permits from one compliance dashboard — what the daily routine now looks like
format: Open with a specific measurable result — a number, a time saved, a cost eliminated — then explain exactly what created it
post:
40 work permits. One screen. Zero missed renewals last month.

A PRO manager in Muscat told us that after 6 weeks on SmartPRO Hub. Not a pitch — his words.

Before, his morning looked like this: open WhatsApp, dig through five threads, copy expiry dates into a spreadsheet, chase three clients for documents, miss one anyway.

Now it takes 11 minutes.

Every permit is in one compliance dashboard — status, expiry, responsible party, next action. Ministry of Labour filings are logged the moment they're submitted. Clients check their own cases through a white-label portal instead of firing off messages.

Nothing lives in someone's inbox. Nothing disappears when a team member goes on leave.

The thing that surprised him most: he stopped being the guy who "follows up." The system does it. He just acts on what needs acting on.

Work permit tracking in Oman was never really the problem. The problem was connecting it to MOL filings, client communication, and renewals — without juggling three separate tools and a shared notes folder that everyone secretly hates.

One platform. All of it. Starts at OMR 25/month.

What's the one compliance task that still eats your week?
